qa_pairs.question: What is the primary function of the OpenStack dashboard GUI?
qa_pairs.answer: The OpenStack dashboard GUI allows you to manage various aspects of your OpenStack cloud project, including creating and managing virtual machines (VMs) and networks.

qa_pairs.question: What software is the OpenStack dashboard GUI based on?
qa_pairs.answer: The GUI is based on software from the OpenStack project called Horizon.

qa_pairs.question: What are the requirements for using the OpenStack dashboard GUI?
qa_pairs.answer: To use the GUI, you only require an internet connection and a web browser, and it can be used from any machine, virtual or otherwise.

qa_pairs.question: What information does the OpenStack dashboard display regarding a project?
qa_pairs.answer: The dashboard shows a project's used resources and available quota.

qa_pairs.question: Does the OpenStack dashboard GUI provide all available functionalities for cloud management?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the OpenStack command line clients allow you to perform functionality which the dashboard does not.

qa_pairs.question: How do I access the OpenStack dashboard GUI?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL to access the dashboard GUI varies by site.

qa_pairs.question: Can you list some URLs for accessing the OpenStack dashboard GUI?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, some URLs include: https://arbutus.cloud.computecanada.ca (Arbutus), https://beluga.cloud.computecanada.ca (Béluga cloud), http://cedar.cloud.computecanada.ca (Cedar), and https://graham.cloud.computecanada.ca (Graham).

qa_pairs.question: What is required to sign in to an OpenStack dashboard GUI URL?
qa_pairs.answer: You must have a project on the cloud site in order to sign in to the respective URL(s).

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find information about obtaining a cloud project?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about obtaining a project, you can read this page: https://docs.alliancecan.ca/wiki/Cloud#Getting_a_Cloud_project.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find more detailed documentation on how to use the OpenStack dashboard GUI?
qa_pairs.answer: For more details on how to use the dashboard GUI, see The OpenStack End User documentation at https://docs.openstack.org/horizon/latest/user.
